title: Taxonomy snapshot (the first real surface): the 10-table public skiller catalog + parent-scope firewall + snapshot-fidelity measure + DAG node
kind: first real capture surface (taxonomy) on the M9a framework; parent-scoped read-side firewall; manifest->CapturedTable fidelity bridge; TaxonomySnapshotSeeder DAG node

tests.stack_snapshot_delta: +39 (128 -> 167): build (taxonomy surface + parent-scope firewall tests) + 3 harden passes (fidelity probe, tenant-probe dispatch, capture error paths) + 2 close regressions (TestCapture_DumpFlagRemoved, TestCapture_DSNAlonePicksDumpIngestDefault)
tests.stack_seeding_delta: +40 (164 -> 204): the CapturedFromManifest bridge + MeasureSnapshot + PgFidelityProbe + datadna measure-snapshot CLI + harden
tests.race: both Go modules pass go test ./... -race
tests.flake_gate: 0 failures across 5x shuffled sequential runs of stack-snapshot (the close-fix-touched module); stack-seeding unchanged + green -race

coverage.note: harden ran 3 passes (recorded in progress.md); the close fix added the source-resolution regressions, raising cmd/stacksnap further

by_package_after_close.cmd/stacksnap: 76.4% (up from 72.3% at harden; rest is live-DB Conn dial bodies behind the interface seam)

delivered.taxonomy_surface: 10-table public skiller surface in FK replay order (categories, job_role_categories -> specializations -> skills, job_roles -> skill_embeddings, job_role_embeddings, skill_translations, job_role_translations, job_role_skills); org-IS-NULL filters + parent-scoped predicates for column-less tables (M9b-D1..D3)
delivered.parent_scope_firewall: TableSpec.PublicViaFK + firewall.ParentScopeFilter build a real WHERE <fk> IN (SELECT id FROM <parent> WHERE organization_id IS NULL) predicate; the post-capture leak probe ANDs the capture filter (M9b-D2; PR-review fix)
delivered.index_rebuild: pgvector index rebuilt via REINDEX TABLE on replay (not transported); vector column + dim 1536 in the manifest, gated by the embedding-dimension gene (M9b-D5)
delivered.fidelity_measure: dna.CapturedFromManifest (manifest.json -> source expectations, refuses non-public-only) + PgFidelityProbe (replay side) + MeasureSnapshot (composes the score, gates critical 100%) + a datadna measure-snapshot CLI (M9b-D6)
delivered.dag_node: TaxonomySnapshotSeeder verification/ordering node (Surface()==taxonomy, verifies replay rather than writing rows); activity DependsOn(taxonomy) (M9b-D7)
delivered.coverage_promotion: data-DNA taxonomy surface waived-m7c -> snapshot-seeded-m9b (all 5 fidelity operators); catalog 100%
delivered.corpus: extended corpus/ops/snapshot-spec.md (the taxonomy capture/replay path + the read-side public-only invariant) + updated corpus/ops/seeding-spec.md (taxonomy promoted) + the alignment_testing wired-to-real-surface note

extensions.head: 55ee0e6

review.scope: GREEN — all 7 sections checked; 0 code TODOs; DEF-M9b-01 LANDED, DEF-M9b-02b DROPPED-by-user (M9b-D9), DEF-M9b-03 tag set
review.code_quality: GREEN — removed the dead --dump flag; gofmt + vet clean; both modules -race green
review.docs: GREEN — the offline-reader contradiction fixed in code (main.go/source.go/README) + corpus (snapshot-spec.md); all cross-references resolve
review.adversarial: the M9b adversarial scenarios were recorded during build/harden (parent-leak-probe AND, atttypmod guard, empty-filter-but-has-org-column edge); no new scenario from the close fix
review.deferral_audit: GREEN (close attempt 2) — DEF-M9b-02b RESOLVED dropped-by-user; 0 unresolved repeat/aged-out

notes: Close attempt 1 BLOCKED at Phase 1b on a RED deferral audit (DEF-M9b-02b, the offline pg_dump-FILE reader, an M9a->M9b repeat/aged-out deferral). The user FATED it DROP. Attempt 2 records the drop (M9b-D9 + audit verdict->GREEN + cut the M9a-retro source carry-forward, NOT seeded to v1.3), lands the companion correctness fix (docs+code stop claiming an offline reader exists; dump-ingest = restore-then---dsn), and proceeds clean to merge.
